createDataGridVueRuntime.rationale: Runtime bootstrap entrypoint must remain stable for external integrators even though workspace demos do not import it.

createDataGridColumnModel.rationale: Low-level column model constructor is part of the supported composition surface for headless consumers.

createDataGridSelectionSummary.rationale: Selection summary helper is still part of the stable public utility surface and should not be removed without an explicit replacement cycle.

createInMemoryDataGridSettingsAdapter.rationale: Default settings adapter constructor remains a valid public integration path outside workspace demos.

evaluateDataGridAdvancedFilterExpression.rationale: Advanced-filter evaluation is a documented public helper and remains part of the stable filter contract.

resolveDataGridHeaderLayerViewportGeomet.rationale: Header viewport geometry remains a documented integration primitive and is still required by downstream non-demo consumers.

resolveDataGridHeaderScrollSyncLeft.rationale: Header scroll sync math is still part of the supported advanced integration contract.

createDataGridViewportController.rationale: Viewport controller is referenced by migration guidance and remains a supported advanced integration primitive.

DataGrid.rationale: Component default/root export is the canonical community app entrypoint and is required regardless of local demo import coverage.

createDataGridRuntime.replacement: Import createDataGridVueRuntime from @affino/datagrid-vue when headless runtime control is required.
createDataGridRuntime.rationale: Laravel facade should converge toward integration-focused exports instead of re-exporting the full runtime bootstrap surface.

buildDataGridColumnLayers.replacement: Import buildDataGridColumnLayers from @affino/datagrid-orchestration directly for low-level layout composition.
buildDataGridColumnLayers.rationale: This is orchestration-layer functionality, not Laravel-specific facade API.

resolveDataGridLayerTrackTemplate.rationale: This helper belongs to orchestration and should not remain on the Laravel stable facade long term.

useDataGridColumnLayoutOrchestration.replacement: Import useDataGridColumnLayoutOrchestration from @affino/datagrid-vue/advanced or use app-level column layout APIs.
useDataGridColumnLayoutOrchestration.rationale: This exposes non-Laravel advanced orchestration surface through the Laravel facade.

useDataGridManagedWheelScroll.replacement: Import useDataGridManagedWheelScroll from @affino/datagrid-vue/advanced directly when needed.
useDataGridManagedWheelScroll.rationale: This is advanced viewport interaction infrastructure rather than Laravel integration API.

resolveDataGridHeaderLayerViewportGeomet.rationale: Advanced header geometry helpers should not stay on the Laravel facade once a direct advanced entrypoint exists.

resolveDataGridHeaderScrollSyncLeft.rationale: Advanced scroll synchronization should move to the advanced facade.

evaluateDataGridAdvancedFilterExpression.rationale: Filter evaluation is still a valid Laravel integration helper for server/client parity checks.

createDataGridRuntime.replacement: Import createDataGridVueRuntime from @affino/datagrid-vue when headless runtime control is required.
createDataGridRuntime.rationale: Laravel app facade should not remain a passthrough for full runtime bootstrap.

buildDataGridColumnLayers.rationale: This is orchestration functionality, not Laravel app-specific API.

resolveDataGridLayerTrackTemplate.rationale: This helper belongs to orchestration, not the Laravel app facade.

useDataGridColumnLayoutOrchestration.replacement: Import useDataGridColumnLayoutOrchestration from @affino/datagrid-vue/advanced or use higher-level app APIs.
useDataGridColumnLayoutOrchestration.rationale: This advanced hook should not stay on the Laravel app facade long term.

useDataGridManagedWheelScroll.rationale: This is advanced viewport infrastructure, not Laravel app-level API.

resolveDataGridHeaderLayerViewportGeomet.rationale: Advanced header geometry should move off the Laravel app facade.

resolveDataGridHeaderScrollSyncLeft.rationale: Advanced scroll synchronization should live on the advanced facade.

evaluateDataGridAdvancedFilterExpression.rationale: Filter evaluation remains useful at the Laravel app layer for parity/integration checks.
